strengths: Deep cross-stack engineering expertise demonstrated through roles spanning frontend, backend, embedded systems, and cloud infrastructure, aligning with the role's need for technical breadth in AI strategy
Direct experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, including MCP code generators, showing hands-on AI platform building
Proven track record of building and scaling open-source platforms (e.g., GISCollective) and entrepreneurial ventures, matching the preference for startup-like innovation within larger organizations
concerns: No explicit AI/ML academic credentials (e.g., no advanced degrees in AI) or recognized AI-focused products listed, which may limit confidence in theoretical AI depth
Limited public evidence of large-scale AI product deployment or advisory work with strategic customers, despite strong general engineering credentials
Recent roles (e.g., re:cinq) are very short-term, raising questions about stability and long-term commitment
response.justification: Bogdan’s resume demonstrates exceptional breadth and depth in engineering, with recent hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, directly aligning with the role’s focus on building and scaling AI-powered platforms. His entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) and consistent delivery of complex systems across full-stack, cloud, and embedded domains further underscore his ability to drive strategic technical innovation. While his academic credentials lack explicit AI focus, his practical contributions to AI tooling and platform development compensate strongly, making him a compelling candidate for a director-level role where builder fluency and execution matter most.
